channel.title: theBalancedBriefNLmindYourBusiness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from theBalancedBriefNLmindYourBusiness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: No AI Plan, No Loan. Small Business Lenders Force Main Street To Face The Future
item.description: Banks are starting to factor artificial intelligence into small business loans, asking borrowers how AI could disrupt their industry over the life of ...

item.title: Teamily AI Brings Agent Teams To Human Teams
item.description: Teamily launches a browser based messaging platform where AI agents join group chats, executing multi step tasks with shared memory and collaboration ...

item.title: Claude Struggles To Cope With ChatGPT Exodus
item.description: Claude suffers a string of service outages as an an influx of users leaving rival ChatGPT overwhelm its infrastructure.

item.title: Apple iOS 26.3 Unexpected New iPhone Software: Should You Upgrade?
item.description: The latest iPhone update is out. So, should you be downloading and installing right now or holding off?

item.title: That’s what studies are for

item.title: Tight rope standing
item.description: It’s much easier to walk a tight rope than it is to simply stand in place. Forward momentum creates stability.

item.title: Imagination is work

item.title: The Uncanny Valley
item.description: It used to be an obscure oddity, now we all need to understand it. 18 years ago, I posted this image: …and I still can’t get it out of my head. Sorry....

item.title: The gap between “I” and “no one”
